description_long: This bungalow complex features multiple interconnected single-story structures with light-colored, sloped roofs and a variety of attached and detached buildings. The main building is elongated, with several wings extending outward, and is surrounded by paved walkways and driveways. There are several green lawn patches and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, adding a residential and inviting atmosphere. The roofs are primarily gabled, with some flat-roofed sections and a prominent octagonal central pavilion. The property includes multiple garages or outbuildings, connected by curved and straight driveways. Windows and doors are distributed along the facades, with some areas featuring grouped windows and others more sparsely arranged.
description: A sprawling, single-story bungalow complex with gabled and flat roofs, landscaped lawns, and multiple attached and detached structures connected by driveways.
description_view_0: From this angle, the elongated main building and several outbuildings are visible, with green lawns and a curved driveway leading to a detached garage.
description_view_1: This view highlights the central pavilion, the main entrance area, and the arrangement of the garages and outbuildings at the rear.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow complex is visible, showing the full extent of the main building, additional garages, and the spread of the property.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the octagonal pavilion, the main driveway, and the relationship between the main building and the detached structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
